0.text: DIFC Courts Rules of Court Order No. 4 of 2017 Revoking DIFC Courts Rules of Court Order No. 2 of 2017

2.text: of Order No. 4 of 2017DIFC Courts (/glossary/difc-courts/) Rules (/glossary/rules/) Court (/glossary/court/) Revoking DIFC Courts Rules of Court Order No. 2 of 2017

3.text: I, Michael Hwang, of the DIFC Courts, make the following Order: InChief Justice (/glossary/chief-justice/) exercise of the powers conferred on me by Article 8(3)(a) of Dubai Law No. 9 of 2004, as amended; and after having reviewed:

4.text: Dubai Law No. 9 of 2004 in respect of the , as amended;DIFC (/glossary/difc/) Dubai Law No. 12 of 2004 in respect of the Judicial Authority at the DIFC, as amended; DIFC Law No. 10 of 2004 in respect of the DIFC Courts Law;

5.text: DIFC Order No. 1 of 2014 in respect of the Rules of the DIFC Courts; and

6.text: DIFC Courts Rules of Court Order No. 2 of 2017 Amending Part 44 of the Rules of the DIFC Courts

7.text: 1.This Order may be cited as the Rules of Court Order No. 4 of 2017.

8.text: 2. The Rules of Court Order No. 2 of 2017 be hereby revoked.

9.text: 3. The electronic version of the Amended Part 44 be removed from the online version of the Rules of the DIFC Courts, with the version of Part 44 prior to the amendment to remain in effect until further Order.

10.text:
4. Judgments and Orders issued between 4 April 2017, being the date of effect of the Rules of Court Order No.   
2 of 2017, and the date of this Order shall be subject to the version of Part 44 prior to the amendment.

12.text: Chief Justice of the DIFC Courts
